name: Glass Patio Side Table - Black - Room Essentials™
description: Make a sleek and stylish addition to your patio with this Glass Patio Side Table from Room Essentials™. Showcasing a square glass tabletop, this patio side table is surrounded by a black metal frame for an attractive look that upgrades your space with modern style. Place this metal-frame side table alongside a patio sofa or chair to serve meals or showcase your faux floral arrangements and decorative figurines.
